title: solanum incanum var. subexarmatum
intro: Solanum incanum var. subexarmatum, also known as a variant of the Solanum incanum plant, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family that is native to tropical regions. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Solanum incanum var. subexarmatum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by drying the leaves and stems, which can then be used to create teas, infusions, or topical applications.
